name: IdsEdwDntlProcLmtDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_base AS (SELECT D.DNTL_PROC_LMT_SK, COALESCE(CD1.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD, D.LMT_CMPNT_ID, D.ACCUM_NO AS DNTL_PROC_LMT_ACCUM_NO, D.PROC_CD, D.PROC_CD_TYP_CD, D.LMT_CMPNT_SK, D.PROC_CD_SK, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD_NM,'UNK') AS PROC_CD_TYP_NM, D.PROC_CD_TYP_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.DNTL_PROC_LMT D LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD1 ON D.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD1.CD_MPPNG_SK LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 ON D.PROC_CD_TYP_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK), cte_trans AS (SELECT DNTL_PROC_LMT_SK, LMT_CMPNT_ID, DNTL_PROC_LMT_ACCUM_NO, PROC_CD, PROC_CD_TYP_CD, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(SRC_SYS_CD) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE SRC_SYS_CD END AS SRC_SYS_CD, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LMT_CMPNT_SK, PROC_CD_SK, CASE WHEN dbo.trim_default(PROC_CD_TYP_NM) = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE PROC_CD_TYP_NM END AS PROC_CD_TYP_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, PROC_CD_TYP_CD_SK FROM cte_base), cte_final AS (SELECT DNTL_PROC_LMT_SK, LMT_CMPNT_ID, DNTL_PROC_LMT_ACCUM_NO, PROC_CD, PROC_CD_TYP_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LMT_CMPNT_SK, PROC_CD_SK, PROC_CD_TYP_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, PROC_CD_TYP_CD_SK FROM cte_trans) SELECT * FROM cte_final
